threats.description: SEO poisoning lure domain impersonating VLC. Part of AsyncRAT campaign active since Oct 2025 delivering trojanized installers. While primarily traditional malware delivery, the SEO poisoning technique poisons LLM search results and AI recommendations

SEO poisoning lure domain impersonating VLC Media Player, distributing trojanized installers with AsyncRAT via DLL sideloading. Uses fake Schema.org ratings in search snippets and hreflang tags for multiple locales to maximize search result visibility. Discovered by FOX-IT/NCC Group in March 2026.
